title: devops
description: DevOps is a way of working where software development (Dev) and IT operations (Ops) teams collaborate closely to build, test, and release software faster and more reliably. It focuses on automation, continuous integration, and continuous delivery to improve efficiency and product quality.

title: Unit 1: Introduction to DevOps
description:
What is DevOps?

History & evolution from Agile to DevOps

Goals and benefits of DevOps

DevOps lifecycle overview (Plan, Develop, Build, Test, Release, Deploy, Operate, Monitor)

Differences between DevOps, Agile, and traditional models (Waterfall)
